# Pranav R - Personal Portfolio & Technical Blog

Welcome to the LLM-friendly index of my personal portfolio and technical blog. I am Pranav R, a Software Engineer passionate about full-stack development, modern web technologies, and software architecture.

## About This Site

This is a full-stack Next.js web application that serves as my digital resume, project showcase, and technical blog.

## Main Sections

- [Home](/) - Introduction, hero section, and highlighted content.
- [About Me](/about) - My background, skills, and journey as a software engineer.
- [Experience](/experience) - My professional work experience and internships.
- [Projects](/projects) - A detailed showcase of my software engineering and college projects.
- [Blog](/blog) - Technical articles and tutorials on software development, architecture, and technology.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials) - Recommendations and feedback from colleagues and mentors.
- [Contact](/contact) - How to get in touch with me for professional inquiries.

## Technical Details

This portfolio is built using:
- Next.js (App Router)
- React
- Supabase (PostgreSQL Database & Auth)
- Tailwind CSS / Custom CSS

## Connect with me

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/pranavr06/
- Email: pranavkundapura18@gmail.com
